repo.description: A microservice based application to demonstrate how chaos engineering works with Simmy using chaos policies in a distributed system.

terms.context_snippet: A microservice based application to demonstrate how chaos engineering works with [Simmy](https://github.com/Polly-Contrib/Simmy) using chaos policies in a distributed system and how we can inject even a custom behavior given our needs or infrastructure, this time injecting custo…
